design_philosophy.visual_style: Strict Dark Mode, High Contrast Typography, Generous Spacing

navbar.style: fixed top-0 w-full z-50 bg-[#0A0A0A] border-b border-[#333333]
navbar.link_style: text-[#F5F0EB] hover:text-[#FFFFFF] text-sm tracking-widest uppercase transition-colors

buttons.primary: bg-[#F5F0EB] text-[#0A0A0A] hover:bg-white px-8 py-4 rounded-none text-sm tracking-widest uppercase font-medium transition-all duration-300
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-[#FFFFFF] text-[#FFFFFF] hover:bg-[#FFFFFF] hover:text-[#0A0A0A] px-8 py-4 rounded-none text-sm tracking-widest uppercase font-medium transition-all duration-300
buttons.cta_sticky: fixed bottom-8 right-24 z-40 shadow-2xl animate-in slide-in-from-bottom-4

cards.base: bg-[#111111] border border-[#333333] p-8 md:p-12 hover:border-[#555555] transition-colors duration-300 rounded-none

inputs.base: bg-[#0A0A0A] border border-[#333333] text-[#F5F0EB] placeholder:text-[#555555] rounded-none focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#FFFFFF] focus:border-[#FFFFFF] px-4 py-3

instructions_to_main_agent: INSTALL FONTS: Ensure Playfair Display and Inter are imported via Google Fonts in index.css.
STRICT DARK MODE: Do not implement a light mode toggle. Force dark mode classes.
NAVIGATION: Create a 'sticky' nav that is pure black (#0A0A0A) with a subtle bottom border (#333333).
HERO SECTION: Use the 'hero_bg' image with a heavy black gradient overlay (bg-gradient-to-r from-black via-black/80 to-transparent) so text on the left is perfectly readable.
CARDS: Use square corners (rounded-none) for a sharper, more premium look.
FORMS: Use Shadcn Form components but override styles to match the 'inputs' design guideline above.
PROPERTY LISTINGS: Display a grid of 3-4 properties using the provided property images. Include 'Beds', 'Price', 'Available Date'.
FOOTER: A massive footer with 'Let's Talk' in large serif font. Pure black background.
ANIMATION: Use framer-motion for simple 'fade-in-up' effects on all sections as they scroll into view.
WHATSAPP: Add a fixed floating action button for WhatsApp in the bottom right.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES: Do not use gradients for backgrounds, only for overlays.
Ensure all text has sufficient contrast (at least 4.5:1).
All interactive elements must have data-testid attributes.
Use lucide-react icons with stroke-width=1 for that 'ultra-thin' luxury look.
